'''zhadhupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jigaboo|jigaboo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jigaboo|jigaboo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhadhupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædhipith|zhædhipith]] || [[word:zhædhipij|zhædhipij]] || [[word:zhædhipish|zhædhipish]] || [[word:zhædhipi|zhædhipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadhudhuputh|zhadhudhuputh]] || [[word:zhadhudhupuj|zhadhudhupuj]] || [[word:zhadhudhupush|zhadhudhupush]] || [[word:zhadhudhupu|zhadhudhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadhuputh|zhadhuputh]] || [[word:zhadhupuj|zhadhupuj]] || [[word:zhadhupush|zhadhupush]] || [[word:zhadhupu|zhadhupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadhufputh|zhadhufputh]] || [[word:zhadhufpuj|zhadhufpuj]] || [[word:zhadhufpush|zhadhufpush]] || [[word:zhadhufpuf|zhadhufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadhuputhu|zhadhuputhu]] || [[word:zhadhupuju|zhadhupuju]] || [[word:zhadhupushu|zhadhupushu]] || [[word:zhadhupuku|zhadhupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadhuputh|zhadhuputh]] || [[word:zhadhupuj|zhadhupuj]] || [[word:zhadhupush|zhadhupush]] || [[word:zhadhupu|zhadhupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadhuputhul|zhadhuputhul]] || [[word:zhadhupujul|zhadhupujul]] || [[word:zhadhupushul|zhadhupushul]] || [[word:zhadhupukul|zhadhupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadhuputhuthu|zhadhuputhuthu]] || [[word:zhadhupujuju|zhadhupujuju]] || [[word:zhadhupushushu|zhadhupushushu]] || [[word:zhadhupuku|zhadhupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadhuputhun|zhadhuputhun]] || [[word:zhadhupujun|zhadhupujun]] || [[word:zhadhupushun|zhadhupushun]] || [[word:zhadhupukun|zhadhupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadhuputhuoro|zhadhuputhuoro]] || [[word:zhadhupujuoro|zhadhupujuoro]] || [[word:zhadhupushuoro|zhadhupushuoro]] || [[word:zhadhupukuoro|zhadhupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
